'''changufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featureliness|featureliness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featureliness|featureliness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| changufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chængifith|chængifith]] || [[word:chængifij|chængifij]] || [[word:chængifish|chængifish]] || [[word:chængifi|chængifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:changungufuth|changungufuth]] || [[word:changungufuj|changungufuj]] || [[word:changungufush|changungufush]] || [[word:changungufu|changungufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:changufuth|changufuth]] || [[word:changufuj|changufuj]] || [[word:changufush|changufush]] || [[word:changufu|changufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:changuffuth|changuffuth]] || [[word:changuffuj|changuffuj]] || [[word:changuffush|changuffush]] || [[word:changuffuf|changuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:changufuthu|changufuthu]] || [[word:changufuju|changufuju]] || [[word:changufushu|changufushu]] || [[word:changufuku|changufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:changufuth|changufuth]] || [[word:changufuj|changufuj]] || [[word:changufush|changufush]] || [[word:changufu|changufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:changufuthul|changufuthul]] || [[word:changufujul|changufujul]] || [[word:changufushul|changufushul]] || [[word:changufukul|changufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:changufuthuthu|changufuthuthu]] || [[word:changufujuju|changufujuju]] || [[word:changufushushu|changufushushu]] || [[word:changufuku|changufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:changufuthun|changufuthun]] || [[word:changufujun|changufujun]] || [[word:changufushun|changufushun]] || [[word:changufukun|changufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:changufuthuoro|changufuthuoro]] || [[word:changufujuoro|changufujuoro]] || [[word:changufushuoro|changufushuoro]] || [[word:changufukuoro|changufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
